final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial photo
Asset type: social media banner, Weibo news/hot topic cover
Primary request: panoramic city skyline at dusk with dramatic lighting and real documentary feel
Scene/backdrop: urban skyline at golden hour, neon signs beginning to glow, silhouettes of hurrying pedestrians, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset amber and orange
Subject: cityscape with layered depth, street-level energy transitioning to calm skyline
Style/medium: photojournalistic documentary photography, smartphone-shot aesthetic elevated to premium editorial quality
Composition/framing: wide panoramic banner, 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal expanse with generous negative space for text overlay
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, strong light-shadow contrast, golden hour warmth mixed with cool neon glow, cinematic tension between chaos and stillness
Color palette: warm sunset amber, cool blue twilight, vibrant neon pink and cyan accents, deep shadows
Materials/textures: glass building reflections, asphalt texture, motion blur on pedestrians, sharp architectural details
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: maintain 16:9 strict ratio, ample horizontal negative space for text placement, authentic documentary feel without over-processing
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR look, watermark artifacts, plastic textures, deformed architecture
